zh-CN.title: 拒绝做“盲目打字员”：基于“方差隔离”原则的 AI Agent 设计实战
zh-CN.description: 深度复盘工业级 Code Review Agent 的重构历程。探讨如何运用第一性原理引入决策矩阵与方差隔离 (Variance Isolation) 原则，将脆弱的 LLM 概率机重构为鲁棒的智能状态机，规避 AI 编码陷阱。
zh-CN.content:
TL;DR: 在 AI 辅助编程领域，大多数工具的默认逻辑是极其线性的。本文复盘了我们如何通过引入 “决策分叉” 和 “方差隔离 (Variance Isolation)” 原则，将一个脆弱的 Code Review 脚本重构成一个具有极高鲁棒性的生产级 Agent 系统。

在最近重构 gh-address-cr（一个用于自动化处理 GitHub PR Review 评论的 Agent Skill）时，我们发现简单的线性逻辑——“发现错误 -> 让 LLM 修改代码 -> 提交”——在真实的高级软件工程场景中，不仅天真，而且极其危险。

什么是方差隔离 (Variance Isolation)？

方差隔离是构建鲁棒 AI Agent 的核心设计原则。它要求开发者将“非确定性”的 LLM 推理（概率机）与“确定性”的业务逻辑执行（状态机）进行物理与逻辑层面的彻底解耦。通过将所有格式化、协议解析和副作用操作封装在确定性的脚本中，只允许 LLM 进行高维逻辑决策，从而消除 AI 的随机“幻觉”对系统稳定性的影响。

痛点：被“消除报错”绑架的 Agent

在重构前，Agent 的核心循环非常简单：
抓取未解决的评论 -> 理解并修改代码 -> 跑测试 -> 回复证据 -> 标为已解决

这种“盲目服从”的设计隐藏着三个致命缺陷：

  1. 篡夺审查权：Agent 把所有 CR 建议当成 Bug 来修，直接切断了与审查者深入探讨技术方案的可能性。
  2. 架构腐化：为了迎合细碎的“代码品味”，Agent 往往以破坏局部架构的一致性为代价由 AI 盲目修补。
  3. 无限循环：当 Agent 无法完美修改代码，它会陷入反复尝试的“幻觉黑洞”，造成 Token 的极大浪费。

真正的 Code Review 并非简单的“消除报错”，而是一个达成技术共识的过程。Agent 必须具备技术决策权，而非仅仅是代码搬运工。

破局：引入“大脑”与决策矩阵

为了解决上述问题，我们在 AI Agent 设计中强制切入了一个核心步骤：Analysis & Decision Matrix（分析与决策矩阵）。

在动任何一行代码之前，Agent 必须先进行自我拷问：这真的需要改吗？我们将其设计为 “三叉戟路径” (The Trident Branch)：

  • [ Accept ]：确认改进意见合理。-> 执行修改，附带测试通过证据。
  • [ Clarify ]：审查者产生误解或提出疑问。-> 提供严谨的技术解释，拒绝修改。
  • [ Defer ]：高成本重构。-> 提供后续计划和 Trade-off 分析，推迟执行。

这一步的核心在于：赋能 Agent 在 Prompt 层面学会拒绝。

架构升级：AI Agent 设计从“概率机”到“状态机”

赋予 Agent 决策权后，我们面临一个经典的工程争议：如何为不同路径提供执行工具？

按照传统的单一职责原则 (SRP)，开发者习惯提供细粒度工具。但实践证明，将高度正交的原子工具直接丢给 LLM，是生产环境的梦魇。

第一性原理与方差隔离实现

回到第一性原理审视：

  • LLM 是一台“概率机”：擅长模糊推理，但天生缺乏生成确定性格式（如 JSON/Markdown）的能力。
  • 脚本程序是一台“状态机”：输出具有绝对的确定性，擅长处理规整的逻辑。

设计 Agent 系统的核心逻辑不是代码解耦，而是方差隔离。 我们绝不能让“概率机”去处理“拼接字符串、控制复杂文件路径”这类必须 100% 准确的任务。

工具收敛：构建“漏斗型”分发器

最终，我们构建了一个参数化的多模态脚本：
generate_reply.sh --mode <fix | clarify | defer> --rationale "<...text...>"

LLM 的角色从“流水线装配员”转变为“高阶决策者”。它只负责逻辑判断和语义生成，底层琐碎的格式校验全部被密封在 Bash 脚本的确定性黑箱中。

终极状态机架构图

重构后的系统架构通过一个强力的“漏斗”收束了所有的不确定性：

graph TD
    classDef brain fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    classDef tool fill:#d4f1f4,stroke:#189ab4,stroke-width:2px
    classDef gate fill:#ffe4e1,stroke:#cd5c5c,stroke-width:2px

    Start[Start: Analyze PR Comments] --> Decision{The Trident Branch}
    
    Decision -- Accept --> Fix[2a. Modify Code & Generate Evidence]:::brain
    Decision -- Clarify --> GenerateC[2b. Generate Explanation]:::brain
    Decision -- Defer --> GenerateD[2c. Analyze Trade-offs]:::brain

    Fix --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode fix]:::tool
    GenerateC --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode clarify]:::tool
    GenerateD --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode defer]:::tool

    Funnel --> Post[3. post_reply.sh]:::tool
    Post --> Resolve[4. resolve_thread.sh]:::tool
    Resolve --> FinalGate[5. final_gate.sh]:::gate
    
    FinalGate -- Failed --> Start
    FinalGate -- Success --> Done([Done])

图：Code Review Agent 的最终架构图，展示了从决策到执行的方差收束。

总结

在开发工业级 AI Agent 时，不要试图让它包揽一切：

  1. 认知增强：必须在 Prompt 层面强制切入决策分析。赋能 Agent “拒绝”的权利。
  2. 工具降维：使用带有强类型参数的聚合型“大工具”，将控制流从概率机中抽离，才是收束系统熵增的唯一正途。

延伸阅读：

  • 如何构建团队专属的自动化 AI 帮手：Antigravity Agent 深度指南
  • SDD 系列 (1)：从 Spec 到任务拆解的演进之路
    糊推理和语义生成，但天生缺乏确定性。
  • 脚本/程序是一台“状态机”：只要输入固定，输出具有绝对的确定性。

设计 Agent 系统的核心逻辑，不是代码解耦，而是“方差隔离”。 我们绝不能让“概率机”去处理“拼接字符串、对齐 Markdown、控制复杂文件路径”这类必须 100% 准确的任务。

工具收敛：构建“漏斗型”分发器

最终，我们放弃了细碎的工具链，构建了一个参数化的多模态脚本：
generate_reply.sh --mode <fix | clarify | defer> --rationale "<...text...>"

LLM 的角色从“流水线装配员”转变为“高阶决策者”。它只负责最高维度的逻辑判断（推断 Mode）和核心语义生成（撰写理由），而底层繁琐的格式校验、模板填充和文件写入，全部被密封在 Bash 脚本的确定性黑箱中。

终极状态机架构

经过重构后的系统架构，通过一个强力的“漏斗”收束了所有的不确定性：

graph TD
    classDef brain fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    classDef tool fill:#d4f1f4,stroke:#189ab4,stroke-width:2px
    classDef gate fill:#ffe4e1,stroke:#cd5c5c,stroke-width:2px

    Start[Start: Analyze PR Comments] --> Decision{The Trident Branch}
    
    Decision -- Accept --> Fix[2a. Modify Code & Generate Evidence]:::brain
    Decision -- Clarify --> GenerateC[2b. Generate Explanation]:::brain
    Decision -- Defer --> GenerateD[2c. Analyze Trade-offs]:::brain

    Fix --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode fix]:::tool
    GenerateC --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode clarify]:::tool
    GenerateD --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode defer]:::tool

    Funnel --> Post[3. post_reply.sh]:::tool
    Post --> Resolve[4. resolve_thread.sh]:::tool
    Resolve --> FinalGate[5. final_gate.sh]:::gate
    
    FinalGate -- Failed --> Start
    FinalGate -- Success --> Done([Done])

图：Code Review Agent 的最终架构图，展示了从决策到执行的方差收束。

总结

开发大模型应用（Agent）时，我们经常会被其强大的对话能力迷惑，试图让它包揽一切。但实战告诉我们：

  1. 认知增强：必须在 Prompt 层面强制切入决策分析。赋能 Agent “拒绝”的权利，是保持系统完整性的基石。
  2. 工具降维：抛弃迷信细粒度解耦。使用带有强类型参数（Enums）的聚合型“大工具”，将控制流从概率机中抽离，才是收束系统熵增、打造生产级 Agent 的唯一正途。

延伸阅读：

  • 如何构建团队专属的自动化 AI 帮手
  • SDD 系列：规范驱动开发的进化之路

en.title: Refusing to be a "Blind Typist": Practical Guide to AI Agent Design Based on the "Variance Isolation" Principle
en.description: This article provides an in-depth review of the refactoring process of an industrial-grade code review agent. It explores how to apply first principles to introduce decision matrices and variance isolation principles, transforming a fragile LLM probabilistic machine into a robust intelligent state machine and avoiding AI coding pitfalls.
en.content:
TL;DRIn the field of AI-assisted programming, the default logic of most tools is extremely linear. This article reviews how we introduced..."Decision bifurcation" and Variance IsolationThe principle is to refactor a fragile code review script into a highly robust production-grade agent system.

In recent reconstructiongh-address-crWhen working on an Agent Skill for automating GitHub PR Review comments, we found that the simple linear logic—"find bug -> have LLM modify the code -> commit"—is not only naive but also extremely dangerous in real-world advanced software engineering scenarios.

What is variance isolation?

Variance isolationThis is the core design principle for building robust AI agents. It requires developers to completely decouple the "non-deterministic" LLM reasoning (probabilistic machine) from the "deterministic" business logic execution (state machine) at both the physical and logical levels. By encapsulating all formatting, protocol parsing, and side-effect operations in deterministic scripts, allowing only LLM to make high-dimensional logical decisions, the impact of AI's random "illusions" on system stability is eliminated.

Pain point: Agents held hostage by the "remove error reporting" function

Before the refactoring, the Agent's core loop was very simple:
抓取未解决的评论 -> 理解并修改代码 -> 跑测试 -> 回复证据 -> 标为已解决

This design of "blind obedience" hides three fatal flaws:

  1. usurpation of the power of reviewThe agent treats all CR suggestions as bugs to be fixed, directly cutting off the possibility of in-depth discussions with reviewers about technical solutions.
  2. Architectural CorruptionIn order to cater to the nuances of "code taste", agents often blindly patch up local architectures by AI at the cost of disrupting the consistency of the local architecture.
  3. Infinite loopWhen the Agent cannot perfectly modify the code, it will fall into a "black hole" of repeated attempts, resulting in a huge waste of tokens.

True code review is not simply about "eliminating bugs," but rather a process.Reaching a technical consensusThe process. The agent must possess...Technical decision-making powerIt is not merely a code porter.

Breaking the deadlock: Introducing a "brain" and decision matrix

To address the above issues, we forcibly incorporated a core step into the AI ​​Agent design:Analysis & Decision Matrix。

Before changing any line of code, the Agent must first ask itself: Does this really need to be changed? We designed it to be...The Trident Branch：

  • [ Accept ]The suggested improvements have been confirmed as reasonable.Implement the modifications, along with proof that the test passed.
  • [ Clarify ]The reviewer may have misunderstood or raised questions.We provide rigorous technical explanations and refuse to make modifications.
  • [ Defer ]High-cost restructuring.Provide follow-up plans and trade-off analysis, and postpone implementation.

The core of this step lies in:Empower Agents to learn to refuse at the Prompt level.

Architecture Upgrade: AI Agent Design from "Probabilistic Machine" to "State Machine"

After granting decision-making power to the agent, we face a classic engineering controversy:How can execution tools be provided for different paths?

Following the traditional Single Responsibility Principle (SRP), developers are accustomed to providing fine-grained tools. However, practice has shown that...Throwing highly orthogonal atomic tools directly into an LLM is a nightmare for production environments.

First principles and variance isolation implementation

Returning to the first principles for examination:

  • LLM is a "probability machine".They excel at fuzzy reasoning but are inherently lacking in the ability to generate deterministic formats (such as JSON/Markdown).
  • A script program is a "state machine".The output is absolutely deterministic and it excels at handling regular logic.

The core logic of designing an agent system is not code decoupling, but variance isolation.We must never allow probabilistic machines to handle tasks that require 100% accuracy, such as concatenating strings or controlling complex file paths.

Tool Convergence: Building a "Funnel-Shaped" Distributor

Finally, we constructed a parameterized multimodal script:
generate_reply.sh --mode <fix | clarify | defer> --rationale "<...text...>"

LLM's role has shifted from "assembly line assembler" to "high-level decision-maker." It is only responsible for logical judgment and semantic generation, while the low-level, trivial format validation is all sealed in the deterministic black box of the Bash script.

Ultimate State Machine Architecture Diagram

The restructured system architecture effectively eliminates all uncertainties through a powerful "funnel":

graph TD
    classDef brain fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    classDef tool fill:#d4f1f4,stroke:#189ab4,stroke-width:2px
    classDef gate fill:#ffe4e1,stroke:#cd5c5c,stroke-width:2px

    Start[Start: Analyze PR Comments] --> Decision{The Trident Branch}
    
    Decision -- Accept --> Fix[2a. Modify Code & Generate Evidence]:::brain
    Decision -- Clarify --> GenerateC[2b. Generate Explanation]:::brain
    Decision -- Defer --> GenerateD[2c. Analyze Trade-offs]:::brain

    Fix --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode fix]:::tool
    GenerateC --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode clarify]:::tool
    GenerateD --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode defer]:::tool

    Funnel --> Post[3. post_reply.sh]:::tool
    Post --> Resolve[4. resolve_thread.sh]:::tool
    Resolve --> FinalGate[5. final_gate.sh]:::gate
    
    FinalGate -- Failed --> Start
    FinalGate -- Success --> Done([Done])

Figure: The final architecture diagram of the Code Review Agent, showing the variance convergence from decision-making to execution.

Summarize

When developing industrial-grade AI agents, do not try to make them do everything:

  1. Cognitive enhancementDecision analysis must be forcibly initiated at the Prompt level. This empowers agents with the right to "reject."
  2. Tool dimensionality reductionUsing aggregated "large tools" with strong type parameters to extract the control flow from the probabilistic machine is the only correct way to reduce the entropy increase of the convergent system.

Further Reading:

  • How to Build Your Team's Own Automated AI Assistant: A Deep Dive into the Antigravity Agent
  • SDD Series (1): The Evolution from Spec to Task Decomposition
    It employs fuzzy reasoning and semantic generation, but inherently lacks certainty.
  • A script/program is a "state machine".As long as the input is fixed, the output has absolute determinism.

The core logic of designing an agent system is not code decoupling, but "variance isolation".We must never allow a "probabilistic machine" to handle tasks that require 100% accuracy, such as "concatenating strings, aligning Markdown, and controlling complex file paths."

Tool Convergence: Building a "Funnel-Shaped" Distributor

Ultimately, we abandoned the fragmented toolchain and built a parameterized multimodal script:
generate_reply.sh --mode <fix | clarify | defer> --rationale "<...text...>"

LLM's role has shifted from "assembly line assembler" to "high-level decision-maker." It is only responsible for the highest-level logical judgment (inference mode) and core semantic generation (writing reasons), while the tedious underlying format validation, template filling, and file writing are all sealed in the deterministic black box of Bash scripts.

Ultimate State Machine Architecture

The restructured system architecture effectively eliminates all uncertainties through a powerful "funnel":

graph TD
    classDef brain fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    classDef tool fill:#d4f1f4,stroke:#189ab4,stroke-width:2px
    classDef gate fill:#ffe4e1,stroke:#cd5c5c,stroke-width:2px

    Start[Start: Analyze PR Comments] --> Decision{The Trident Branch}
    
    Decision -- Accept --> Fix[2a. Modify Code & Generate Evidence]:::brain
    Decision -- Clarify --> GenerateC[2b. Generate Explanation]:::brain
    Decision -- Defer --> GenerateD[2c. Analyze Trade-offs]:::brain

    Fix --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode fix]:::tool
    GenerateC --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode clarify]:::tool
    GenerateD --> Funnel[generate_reply.sh --mode defer]:::tool

    Funnel --> Post[3. post_reply.sh]:::tool
    Post --> Resolve[4. resolve_thread.sh]:::tool
    Resolve --> FinalGate[5. final_gate.sh]:::gate
    
    FinalGate -- Failed --> Start
    FinalGate -- Success --> Done([Done])

Figure: The final architecture diagram of the Code Review Agent, showing the variance convergence from decision-making to execution.

Summarize

When developing large-scale application agents, we are often misled by their powerful conversational capabilities and try to make them handle everything. But practical experience tells us:

  1. Cognitive enhancementDecision analysis must be forcibly integrated at the Prompt level. Empowering agents with the right to "reject" is the cornerstone of maintaining system integrity.
  2. Tool dimensionality reductionAbandon the superstition of fine-grained decoupling. The only right way to curb system entropy and build production-grade agents is to use aggregated "large tools" with strong-typed parameters (Enums) to extract control flow from probabilistic machines.

Further Reading:

  • How to build a dedicated automated AI assistant for your team
  • SDD Series: The Evolution of Specification-Driven Development
